summary: Comprehensive testing of EdTech CRM Platform iteration 3 features completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working. All 15 features tested successfully.

backend: All 4 role logins (admin, student, teacher, counsellor)
POST /api/admin/create-student - creates student with credentials returned
POST /api/complaints/create - student complaint links to teacher
GET /api/teacher/student-complaints - teacher sees assigned student complaints
GET /api/classes/browse - student sees only assigned teacher's classes
frontend: Student login and dashboard loads with Cancel Today's Session button
Student dashboard shows cancellation tracker (1/3 used, 2 left)
NO Join/Cancel Booking buttons on student dashboard (as expected)
Student Edit Profile dialog with all fields (phone, institute, goal, time slot)
Teacher login and dashboard with notification bell
Teacher notification bell shows unread count (1)
Teacher notifications dialog shows notifications with mark all read
Teacher Student Complaints section shows complaints from assigned students
Teacher class card shows 'Student cancelled 1/3 sessions'
Admin login and dashboard with Add Student tab
Admin Add Student form with all fields (name, email, password, phone, institute, goal, time slot)
Admin create student shows credentials after creation with Copy button
Admin Complaints tab shows all complaints
Browse Classes page shows 'Auto-enrolled in this class' - NO Book button
Counsellor dashboard with stats and available students
Counsellor Complaints page shows 'All Student & Teacher Complaints'

seed_data_creation: Test complaints and test students created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features verified working. Class 'JEE Advanced Math' has 1/3 cancellations used. Student Alice Johnson has 400 credits. Teacher Dr. Maria Garcia has 0 credits in wallet. One test complaint exists from Alice Johnson linked to Dr. Maria Garcia. Admin can create students with credentials displayed after creation.

mocked_apis.Stripe payment checkout: Uses test key (sk_test_emergent), no real webhook

features_verified.student_cancel_class_day: WORKING - Cancel Today's Session button shows remaining cancellations
features_verified.teacher_notifications: WORKING - Bell icon with unread count, notifications dialog
features_verified.teacher_student_complaints: WORKING - Shows complaints from assigned students only
features_verified.admin_create_student: WORKING - Form creates student, shows credentials with copy button
features_verified.counsellor_all_complaints: WORKING - Shows all student & teacher complaints
features_verified.complaint_visibility: WORKING - Student complaints auto-link to assigned teacher
features_verified.browse_classes_no_book: WORKING - Shows 'Auto-enrolled' message, no Book button
features_verified.student_profile_edit: WORKING - All fields editable (phone, institute, goal, time slot)
